notes: NI Emotive Strings — cinematic string library in Kontakt, designed for emotional, dramatic scoring. Recorded with a full string orchestra in a large hall. Unlike the Symphony Series (which emphasises orchestral accuracy and multi-mic studio realism), Emotive Strings is optimised for expressive cinematic writing — smoother legato transitions, longer sustain tails, and a warmer, more blended sound. Uses the same CC 1 + CC 11 dual-dynamics approach as the Symphony Series: CC 1 cross-fades between dynamic layers (affecting tone and level), CC 11 rides the overall output envelope. Articulations via key switches (check instrument KS panel). Especially effective for slow, emotional passages; use long CC 11 automation ramps and subtle CC 1 shaping for maximum expressiveness.

Expression.description: Expression — primary output level envelope. Use slow continuous automation for emotional string swells. Combine with CC 1 for full dynamic shaping.

Modulation.description: Dynamics cross-fade — morphs between soft (pp) and loud (ff) sample layers. Controls both volume and tonal character. Essential for orchestral realism alongside CC 11.

Sustain.description: Sustain pedal — holds legato mode / sustain on some articulations

Quick Control 1.description: Ensemble Size — scales between intimate chamber ensemble and full cinematic string section

Quick Control 2.description: Close Mic Level — direct string mic; more detail and bow texture

Quick Control 3.description: Room / Hall Mic Level — hall ambience; larger space, more blend and emotional weight

Quick Control 4.description: Reverb Amount — built-in cinematic reverb mix; key to the Emotive Strings signature sound

Quick Control 5.description: Attack Shape — bow-on-string onset speed; low = slow, soft, emotional; high = dramatic, assertive entries

Quick Control 6.description: Release Time — string decay tail after note release; longer tails suit slow cinematic passages

Quick Control 7.description: Vibrato Depth — natural player vibrato intensity (add gradually after the initial attack for emotional effect)

Quick Control 8.description: Humanise — random detuning and timing variation between players for a more organic, less sampled character

Brightness.description: Tone brightness — high-shelf filter across the section

Stereo Width.description: Stereo image width of the string section

Portamento.description: Portamento/glide time for legato transitions between notes
